title: The Beach Villa
overview: Beach Villa tells the story of a village family who are supposed to take care of a villa for 6 months as caretakers.  Chavosh, the owner of the villa, is going to live outside of Iran for 6 months for his daughter to go to university, and he leaves the villa to Yunus and his wife, and they move to the villa with their 3 children.  But upon entering the house, Yunus' brother-in-law creates stories that...
